rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.015 governs school principal reports to law enforcement about student criminal activity. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative interaction.
quote: Sec. 37.015. REPORTS TO LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT; LIABILITY.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and school safety reporting requirements.
